text:
With this brief background I am furnishing in this web page all pertinent training & placement related information of the institute. I would request you to kindly visit our campus for selecting candidates of your choice on any date convenient to both of us with an expectation that our interaction will grow uninterruptedly over the years to come. **Dr Manash Chandra Das, TPO** | | **
